    • 401

Submit a coffee batch

POST
/batch/submit

Authorizations

Section titled “Authorizations ”
  • BearerAuth

Request Body required

Section titled “Request Body required ”
object
farmer_id
required
string
cooperative_id
required
string
weight_kg
required
number
>= 1 <= 5000
grade
required
string
Allowed values: screen18 screen15 screen12 bp1
moisture_pct
number
>= 8 <= 16
collection_point_gps
object
lat
number
lng
number
collector_agent_id
string

Responses

Section titled “ Responses ”

200

Section titled “200 ”

Batch submitted successfully

object
success
boolean
batch_id
string
token_id
string
mantle_tx_hash
string
hedera_message_id
string
payment_status
string
payment_amount_ugx
integer
estimated_payment_seconds
integer

400

Section titled “400 ”

Bad request

object
error
string
code
string

401

Section titled “401 ”

Unauthorized

object
error
string
code
string
